text.p: Please pardon the long period of silence.I've been trying to reach you for months now, and i just typed in your name on the net and stumbled on this Handbook PROJECT. Pls. is it late to make a submission? I have a partly written article on critical discourse analysis. Pls let me know. This time, I promise that by the special grace of God, I will keep to the date.
God bless you and warm regards.
